## Accessibility And UX Review

<!-- Required for UI changes; mark not applicable for documentation-only changes. -->

- [ ] Keyboard interaction is supported.
- [ ] Screen-reader labels and semantics are preserved.
- [ ] Colour contrast and focus states remain clear.
- [ ] Responsive layouts were checked on mobile and desktop.
- [ ] Reduced-motion or animation impact was considered.

## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `type/area-slug` where possible.
- [ ] This PR links to an open issue.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for new UI or behaviour.
- [ ] Documentation was updated for visible or API-facing changes.
- [ ] No secrets, payout wallets, tokens, or unrelated CI workflow changes are included.
